text: Guess who's back? Back again? Chow's back. Tell a friend.
Good morning, sunshine. I'm the sunshine. Deal with it.
So long! Chow has left the building, baby!
Sleep is a rumor spread by boring people.
Bring a marble skateboard to the VIP section or don't bother.
Meet me in Vegas. Dress sensational or go home.
Meet me in the winner's circle. Dress dangerous or go home.
